must_detect.matched_text:
Parties: Blue Banyan Limited (SGX Mainboard issuer; UEN: 2015BANYANZ) as Buyer and Mango Ridge Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 2013MANGOZ) as Target; this term sheet is non-binding except for confidentiality, PDPA, costs and governing law.
Transaction: Proposed acquisition of a controlling stake of up to 70% of the issued shares of Mango Ridge Pte. Ltd. by Blue Banyan Limited via a share purchase.
Consideration: Mix of cash and new Blue Banyan shares (ISIN: ZZ0000000000 placeholder), with exact quantum and formula to be agreed by reference to 30 trading-day VWAP; no price-sensitive figure is set out herein.
Regulatory/SGX: Expected to be a major transaction under SGX-ST Listing Manual Chapter 10, subject to shareholder approval and SGX-ST clearance; not an IPT under Chapter 9 (to be confirmed).
Public Information: The parties refer to the non-binding MOU announced on SGXNet on 12 Feb 2026 and intend that this term sheet contains only information already generally available.
Conditions Precedent: Satisfactory legal/financial/tax due diligence conducted in a PDPA-compliant manner, MAS confirmations where applicable, no material adverse change, key customer contracts renewal, and standard corporate approvals.
PDPA/Data Room: Seller to provide a clean room with masking/anonymisation of personal data; no uploading of national identification numbers, medical certificates, or biometric templates; Buyer to sign data intermediary terms and follow the Data Minimisation Policy.
Employment/Integration: Post-completion, Target to adopt the Harmony DEI Charter and SugarLeaf Wellness Programme; no retrenchment exercise without prior consultation and fair selection metrics unrelated to protected characteristics.
Intentional sensitive disclosure: For HR purposes only, Target confirms that its HR Manager is a member of the Crescent Office Staff Union; Buyer will not process or rely on this union membership for redundancy or promotion decisions.
MNPI Handling: Any non-public information shared will be treated as inside information under the SFA and SGX Listing Rule 703; wall-crossing acknowledgements and cleansing announcements to be coordinated through the Company Secretary.
